name: Hot Pink Disco Ball Cup 14 fl oz - Spritz™
description:
Add some sparkle to your drinkware with the Hot Pink Disco Ball Cup from Spritz™. Made from durable BPA-free plastic material, this cup is perfect for cold beverages. It comes with a convenient straw, making it easy to sip your favorite drinks. With a generous 20 fl oz capacity, it's ideal for parties, picnics, or everyday use. The vibrant hot pink color and disco ball design will surely make your drink stand out and add a fun vibe to any occasion.


Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™.
